description: Style NoteInspired by the Spin bowling during the 1996 World Cup, spinz came into being. A range of long lasting perfumed deodorants from CavinKare, these deos with their sporty fragrance are quite the favourite among the ladies. Product DetailsSpinz's Samba deo comes in an aerosol spray canister and has a citrus and floral blended aromaCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize150 ml
